title: 23:21 芒聙聰 September 12, 2023
body_text:
23:21 芒聙聰 September 12, 2023
Indemnifiable Amount Increased for Receiver General Warrants and BC Employment Cheques and Imprest Cheques
We updated the Payment Solutions Manual to reflect the increases to indemnifiable amounts for
Receiver General Warrants
BC Employment and Assistance Cheques and Imprest Cheques
We also made some general revisions throughout:
Updated the name of CPA Rule G8 to 芒聙聹Procedures/Criteria Pertaining to the Encashment of Receiver General Warrants for Non-Customers芒聙聺
Changed 芒聙聹Ministry of Housing and Social Development芒聙聺 to 芒聙聹Ministry of Social Development and Poverty Reduction芒聙聺
Changed 芒聙聹Government of Canada Warrants芒聙聺 to 芒聙聹Receiver General Warrants芒聙聺
Changed 芒聙聹secure site芒聙聺 to 芒聙聹Client Centre芒聙聺 and updated login procedures
Updated the contact information for validating the legitimacy of a BC cheque (only call if there are specific reasons to be concerned:
778-405-4306
or
1-877-377-7702
)
Clearing and Deposits Volume
Deposit Processing Part
Section 2.2, Frequently Asked Questions
We updated the response to Question 2, clarifying that financial institutions are required to cash Receiver General Warrants for non-members, but only up to $1,750.
Section 3.2, CPA Rules
We updated the indemnifiable amount to $1,750 for Receiver General Warrants.
Section 5.5, Receiver General Warrants
We updated the indemnifiable amount to $1,750 for Receiver General Warrants.
Section 5.6, BC Employment and Assistance Cheques
We updated the indemnifiable amount to $4,500 for BC Employment and Assistance Cheques and Imprest cheques; we updated the Photo聽ID Letter provided by the Ministry for non-member payees who don芒聙聶t have acceptable identification.
Dishonour and Return of Cheques Part
Section 2.1, Definitions
Added a definition for Client Centre.
Section 3.1, CPA Rules
We updated the indemnifiable amount to $1,750 for Receiver General Warrants.
Section 7.1, Requesting Reimbursement for Fraudulent or Non-Fraudulent BC Employment and Assistance Cheques
We updated the indemnifiable amount to $4,500 for BC Employment and Assistance Cheques and Imprest cheques.
Section 7.3, Requesting Reimbursement for Dishonoured Receiver General Warrants
We updated the indemnifiable amount to $1,750 for Receiver General Warrants.
